tools.name: feeds.listAvailability
tools.description: Discover details of on-demand availability for programmes and their versions

tools.name: feeds.listBroadcasts
tools.description: Fetch metadata about linear Broadcasts and Services, allowing the generation of Television and Radio schedules and other datasets for broadcast items. Use /schedules instead of this feed as it is more efficient. Broadcasts will be deprecated in the future.

tools.name: feeds.listGroups
tools.description: Long-lived curated collections of programmes and more, including Collections, Seasons, Franchises and Galleries

tools.name: feeds.listImages
tools.description: Find metadata for images, particularly those in galleries

tools.name: feeds.listItems
tools.description: Look inside programmes to find segments: chapters, tracks and more

tools.name: feeds.listMasterbrands
tools.description: List all Master Brands

tools.name: feeds.listPeople
tools.description: The People feed allows you to search for the people and groups that contribute to programmes. This is the starting point for cast and crew credits, as well as finding contributors using external IDs (such as Wikipedia URLs)

tools.name: feeds.listPips
tools.description: Look inside pips entities

tools.name: feeds.listProgrammeDetails
tools.description: Exposes programme information for a single pid

tools.name: feeds.listProgrammes
tools.description: Fetch metadata about Programmes (brands, series, episodes, clips). By applying different filter restrictions this feed can be used in many ways, for example to retrieve all series belonging to a brand, all the episodes and/or clips for a specific series, or any TLEO objects for a masterbrand. Other filters permit restricting to specific formats and/or genres, and you can request specific versions (for example Signed or Audio-Described). Parameters may be combined in any way suitable for your application.

tools.name: feeds.listPromotions
tools.description: Details of short-term editorially curated "promotions", for instance those programmes featured on iPlayer today

tools.name: feeds.listSchedules
tools.description: Dates, Times, Schedules: when and where are programmes being shown?

tools.name: feeds.listServices
tools.description: The services feed exposes the linear broadcast "services" from PIPs. These are the actual services which broadcast programmes (eg bbc_one_oxford is the service for BBC One in Oxford).

tools.name: feeds.listVersions
tools.description: The versions feed exposes editorial "Versions" of programmes. These are concepts used to capture different presentations of an overall programme: for example, versions of a programme may include one with sign language, one with audio description, one edited for content and more. Versions are also important to understand for broadcasts: a linear broadcast or an ondemand is always of a specific version, not merely of a programme.

tools.name: raw.getRawAncestors
tools.description: Get raw ancestors

tools.name: raw.getRawBrand
tools.description: Get raw brand

tools.name: raw.getRawBrandFranchises
tools.description: Get raw brand franchises

tools.name: raw.getRawEpisode
tools.description: Get raw episode

tools.name: raw.getRawFormats
tools.description: Get raw formats

tools.name: raw.getRawGenreGroups
tools.description: Get raw genre groups

tools.name: raw.getRawImage
tools.description: Get raw image

tools.name: raw.getRawMasterbrand
tools.description: Get raw masterbrand

tools.name: raw.getRawPromotion
tools.description: Get raw promotion

tools.name: schema.getApi
tools.description: Get API definition

tools.name: schema.getXsd
tools.description: Get Schema definition

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
